Export captured data as JSON/HTML/CSV fi: Export captured data as JSON/HTML/CSV file. This may take a while depending on the amount of data. The exported file does not include media files such as images and videos but only the URLs.
Download and save media files referenced: Download and save media files referenced by the selected notes. This may take a while depending on the amount of data. Supported downloads include note images and videos.
Download and save media files referenced by the selected comments. This may take a while depending on the amount of data. Supported downloads include comment pictures.
For more than 100 media or large files,: For more than 100 media or large files, it is recommended to copy the URLs and download them with an external download manager such as aria2.
Click for more information. Each URL wil: Click for more information. Each URL will be on a new line, with its filename on the next line. This format is compatible with aria2.
Failed to export media. Open DevTools fo: Failed to export media. Open DevTools for more details.
Failed to copy media URLs. Open DevTools: Failed to copy media URLs. Open DevTools for more details.
